global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'EarnPath' logo positioned in the top left. The main message is conveyed through a prominent headline 'Secure & simple' and supporting body text 'Built for peace of mind', both centered in the middle of the ad. A call-to-action button labeled 'Claim reward' is located at the bottom center. The overall composition includes geometric decorative elements that enhance the visual appeal without overpowering the main content.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with high contrast elements
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple investment experience with a reward incentive.

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, displayed in the top left corner of the crop.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the crop with the text 'Claim reward'.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A circular and rectangular shape in a blue background, positioned in the upper left area of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of a circle and a rectangle in a blue background, positioned in the upper part of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest emphasizing security and simplicity with a call to action.
